entries.description: Read project-guidance.md, lessons-learned.md, session-set-authoring-guide.md, ai-led-session-workflow.md, spec.md
Ran ai_router.start_session; session-state.json -> session 1 in-progress (v4)

Re-verified live tree: session-issues-schema.md, disposition-schema.md, session_state.py (_build_sessions_array truncates vs totalSessions), writer_discipline.py (D3 content-blind/Lightweight-inert), start_session.py; captured 7 grounding facts
De-duplicated docs/proposals/2026-06-05-...md: kept cleaner second draft as proposal of record
Cross-provider consensus on Q1-Q7 with L1-L4 context (orchestrator excluded); raw outputs saved UTF-8-first
Authored ai-assignment.md per-session recommendation via routed analysis (Rule 17)
Q6 split materially; surfaced to operator via AskUserQuestion -> chose hard-TTY/soft-non-TTY
Wrote verdict.md, s1-audit-record.md, S1 Audit Lock block in spec.md; corrected S2 step 4 (D3-extension rejected -> content-aware close-time validator)
Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5-4): ISSUES_FOUND, 2 Major doc-consistency findings; persisted s1-issues.json
Fixed both: scrubbed stale D3-extension text in spec.md; reframed Q6 --accept-suggestions bypass as non-locked S3 detail in verdict.md+spec.md
Re-verification (gpt-5-4): VERIFIED, both issues resolved, no regressions
Added session.type (work|verification|remediation, default work) to progress.py + preserved across writer rebuilds (_build_sessions_array); documented in session-state-schema.md

Extended sN-issues.json to schemaVersion 2: promoted optional finding fields (issueId/issueType/verificationMethod/suggestedTestOrCheck) + enum-enforced resolution_status/issueType when present; v1 stays valid; updated schema JSON, doc, example fixture

Implemented register_typed_session_start (appends typed sessions[] entry, grows totalSessions, fail-loud refusals) + start_session --type CLI branch with type-announcement banner pointing typed sessions at the workflow doc

Added dedicated_verification.py: content-aware close-time validator (different-engine verification before terminal close); D3 left unchanged; non-blocking advisory wired into close_session (gate strength deferred to S3)
Added 7-state derive_workflow_state per Q3 ladder (sessions[]+verdicts+latest sN-issues+verificationMode record) + verificationMode reader/writer + seed_issues_envelope
Added test_dedicated_verification.py + test_typed_session_writer.py + extended schema tests; full Python suite green
Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5-4): ISSUES_FOUND, 3 Major correctness findings; persisted s2-verification.md + s2-issues.json
Fixed all 3 Major in-flight: validator empty-baseline fail-closed; advisory-disagreement reclassified as human-stop dispute; seed_issues_envelope rejects VERIFIED verdict; added regression tests
Re-verification (gpt-5-4): VERIFIED, all 3 resolved, no regressions

S3 start: read spec S1/S2 locks, workflow doc Lightweight section, close-out ref, dedicated_verification.py, close_session.py, start_session.py, register_typed_session_start, rule-6 invariant. Locked S3 design: hand-off writer (atomic close-typed + open-next-typed), Q6 hard-TTY/soft-non-TTY gate, --verification-mode capture.
CODE: register_typed_session_handoff (atomic close-typed + open-next-typed; rule-6-safe) in session_state.py + tests (test_typed_session_writer.py)
CODE: --verification-mode capture (start_session) + resolve_and_record/read_spec/has_record helpers (dedicated_verification.py), made IMMUTABLE after first record per R1 finding; tests

CODE: Q6 close_session gate strength (hard-TTY/soft-non-TTY, terminal-only, --accept-suggestions); validate_dedicated_verification gained closing_session_number; _close_is_terminal helper; tests (test_dedicated_verification_close_gate.py)

DOC: rewrote Lightweight verification section of ai-led-session-workflow.md as per-set (L1) with Mode A/B, generic typed-session procedure, bounded rounds, seven states, Q6 gate, second-opinion tie-breaker; added --handoff CLI usage
DOC: session-set-authoring-guide.md verificationMode field semantics + capture mechanism + session type values
TEST: end-to-end fixture test_dedicated_verification_e2e.py (work->verification finds issues->remediation->re-verify->terminal close)
RELEASE: dabbler-ai-router 0.15.0->0.16.0 (pyproject.toml, __init__.py, CHANGELOG.md, repository-reference.md walk); PyPI publish HELD for v0.16.0
Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5-4) R1: ISSUES_FOUND, 2 Major (verificationMode mutability; doc freehand-edit) + 1 Minor (closed-verified/dispositioned table overlap); $0.2326
Cross-provider re-verification (gpt-5-4) R2: VERIFIED, all 3 R1 findings resolved; $0.1052
